channel.title: c on Tiago Barros
channel.description: Recent content in c on Tiago Barros

item.title: Tarzan's Forest
item.description: This one is an old school project, but one that still makes me proud. The actual problem is very simple: Tarzan, the Lord of the Jungle, always traverses the regions of the forest he lives with ease, by jumping from one tree to another. But last night, a great storm took down some of the trees. Will tarzan be able to go from one region to another with the remaining trees?
